approval_history.reason_for_reapproval: Human authorized immediate lock of the current v0.14-001 revision and activation of v0.14-001/002/003 as one Runtime entry contract bundle for Louke self-development.

binding_decisions.scope_upper_bound: hard-capped at flow.md L95; L96+ excluded by spec Out-of-Scope

downstream_artifacts_required.m_testplan: Authored by Archer; reviewed by S-tier Prism (sole technical reviewer); Shield may provide executability feedback but not approve; Sage MUST NOT approve M-TESTPLAN.
downstream_artifacts_required.m_arch: Authored by Archer; reviewed by Prism; defines workflow driver, write ownership lease, review verdict semantics, semantic task/session persistence, OpenCode result validation adapter, reconcile identity contracts.
downstream_artifacts_required.m_dev: Driven by Devon; covered by FR-1900 / FR-2000 / FR-2100 / NFR-0100 / NFR-0200 / NFR-0300; the four out-of-scope items (return-upstream/bounded waiver/no-new-debt adoption/CLI absence) belong to v0.14 spec 2/3/4.

stale_triggers: Any byte change in story.md, spec.md, or acceptance.md invalidates the current decision.
Any change in bound_story_digest, spec_digest, acceptance_digest, or doc_index_digest_sha256 invalidates the current decision.
Any movement, replacement, or retagging of the bound release tag v0.14.0 invalidates the current decision.
Adoption of FR-0910 / FR-0110 / FR-0720 contracts into this Spec is forbidden and would invalidate the scope statement.
notes: v0.14-001 spec body / acceptance body / Story content unchanged across revisions 2 -> 6. Only added HTML anchors ( / ) and refreshed frontmatter digest fields.
Decision revision 2 supersedes revision 1 by user authorization 2026-07-18 (anchor support for verify_issue_schema.py).
Downstream Spec 2/3/4 MUST not reinterpret the 24 active units; they only add M-TESTPLAN / M-ARCH / M-DEV support.
Decision revision 3 supersedes only the stale rev6 current binding; approval history revisions 1 and 2 remain unchanged.
v0.14-001/002/003 are activated as one release contract bundle; this bootstrap is for Louke itself and is not host-project production validation.
